summary: Completed testing of Absences (leaves) and Directory (Annuaire) page enhancements. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only, no functional impact

critical_code_review_comments: Directory page employee cards don't have data-testid attributes (minor - tests still work via text selectors)
seed_data_creation: Test leaves created and cleaned up via pytest. Existing test data from Marie Martin with various leave types (vacation, sick, accident, training, maternity, paternity).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Absences and Directory enhancements verified working. Absences page has search bar (filters by name, type, reason), status filter chips (Tous, En attente, Approuvees, Refusees), edit buttons on pending leaves that open pre-filled modal, delete buttons (trash icon). Directory page has search bar (filters by name, email, department), edit buttons on each employee card showing modal with name/phone/contract hours fields. Backend PUT /api/leaves/{id}, DELETE /api/leaves/{id}, PUT /api/users/{id} all working correctly.

backend.GET_leaves: PASS - Returns list of leaves with user_name, type, dates, status
backend.POST_leaves: PASS - Creates new leave with pending status
backend.PUT_leaves: PASS - Updates leave type, dates, reason
backend.leaves_CRUD_full_cycle: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete verified
backend.GET_directory: PASS - Returns employee list with search-required fields
backend.PUT_users: PASS - Updates user phone and contract_hours

frontend.absences_page_search_bar: PASS - Search bar visible with placeholder 'Rechercher par nom, type, raison...'
frontend.absences_search_filtering: PASS - Search filters leaves by text content
frontend.absences_status_filter_chips: PASS - Tous, En attente, Approuvees, Refusees chips visible and clickable
frontend.absences_edit_button: PASS - 'Modifier' button visible on pending leaves (8 found)
frontend.absences_edit_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens with title 'Modifier l'absence'
frontend.absences_edit_modal_prefilled: PASS - Type, dates, reason pre-filled from leave data
frontend.absences_delete_button: PASS - Delete (trash) icon present on each leave card
frontend.absences_approve_reject_buttons: PASS - 'Approuver' and 'Refuser' buttons visible for managers
frontend.directory_page_search_bar: PASS - Search bar visible with placeholder 'Rechercher un employe...'
frontend.directory_search_filtering: PASS - Search filters employees (searched 'Admin' showed only Admin user)
frontend.directory_edit_button: PASS - 'Modifier' button visible on all 8 employee cards
frontend.directory_edit_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens with title 'Modifier l'employe'
frontend.directory_edit_modal_fields: PASS - Prenom, Nom, Telephone, Heures contrat/semaine fields present
frontend.directory_summary_cards: PASS - Shows Actifs, Absents, Total counts
